details: Added 7 governance lifecycle entries: Provenance, Authority ceiling, Accepted, Rejected, Arbitrated, Contested, Friction rate
Added 3 reconciliation level entries: RECONCILED, FULL, EXERCISED

Added 2 report/export entries: EVIDENCE RECORD, EVIDENCE STATE
Added 7 topology/centrality entries: STRUCTURAL CLUSTERS, CODE GRAPH FILES, IMPORT EDGES, INHERITANCE EDGES, IMPORT AUTHORITY, INHERITANCE AUTHORITY, NOMINAL
Added 4 lineage status entries: EXACT, STRONG, PARTIAL, WEAK
Added 2 topology context entries: Zone Anchor, Primary Pressure Zone
